title: Crispy Tofu Pita Bites
description: A tasty and healthy snack made with crispy tofu and served in a gluten-free pita. Perfect for a quick bite on the go!

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Press and drain excess water before use

ingredients.name: Delight
ingredients.notes: Sauce or seasoning of your choice

instructions: Cut the tofu into small cubes.
Dredge the tofu cubes in a mixture of your favorite seasonings and spices.
Heat about 1/2 inch of cooking oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the tofu cubes and fry until golden brown and crispy.
Transfer the fried tofu to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Cut the pita breads into bite-sized pieces.
Fill the pita bites with the crispy tofu and any desired garnishes.
